commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Be not desirous of his delicacies: for they are deceitful food. There is no limit to the gluttony that these people practice. Truly, in ever inventing a multitude of new sweets and ever seeking recipes of every description, they are shipwrecked on pastries and honey cakes and desserts. To me, a man of this sort seems nothing more than one great mouth. … As for us, who seek a heavenly food, we must restrain the belly and keep it under the control of heaven.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Wisdom and virtue, and not by injustice can the house be established.
